title: Camp Cobblemon
description: A custom modpack for Camp Cobblemon. It adds a few quality-of-life mods to the existing official Cobblemon Modpack.
body:
**This is a mod pack for Camp Cobblemon that adds a few quality-of-life mods, such as backpacks, storage drawers, and Litematica, the schematic mod. It's compatible with multiplayer, though it can also be used for single-player with no issues!**

This mod pack IS REQUIRED if you wish to play on Camp Cobblemon.
